title: Virtualization Talos
text:
1. Deploy the Headless service for workers

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: talos-workers
    spec:
      clusterIP: None
      ports:
      - name: https
        port: 6443
        protocol: TCP
        targetPort: 6443
      - name: api
        port: 50000
        protocol: TCP
        targetPort: 50000
      selector:
        kubevirt.io/vmpool: talos-worker
      sessionAffinity: None
      type: ClusterIP
    ```

1. Upload generated configs to the NRP cluster

    ```bash
    kubectl create secret generic talos-secrets --from-file=talos-config
    ```

1. Run the talosctl deployment to get access to workers

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: talosctl
      labels:
        app: talosctl
    spec:
      replicas: 1
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: talosctl
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: talosctl
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: deploy
              image: alpine
              resources:
                requests:
                  cpu: 100m
                  memory: 100Mi
                limits:
                  cpu: 1
                  memory: 1Gi
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - |
                  apk add curl openssl bind-tools;
                  curl -sL https://talos.dev/install | sh;
                  sleep infinity;
              imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
              volumeMounts:
                - mountPath: "/talos-config"
                  name: config
          volumes:
          - name: config
            secret:
              secretName: talos-secrets
    ```

1. Once all worker VMs are running, exec to the `talosctl` deployment and bootstrap the workers from it

    :::caution
    Change <your_namespace> to your actual namespace
    :::
